reviews.text: Had a really great experience at this cafe! The ambience was cozy and peaceful ,the food tasted amazing and the staff were super friendly and welcoming especially 2 girls from Northeast. Definitely a nice place to relax and spend time. Would love to visit again

Lovely experience at Cafe Medusa! The food was delicious, the ambience was warm and inviting, and the servers were extremely polite and accommodating. We tried the platter and the burrata pizza—both were excellent and full of flavor. Definitely a place worth visiting for a relaxed and enjoyable meal.
Nice ambience quiet and cozy place , perfect for families ! Polite n humble staff .. superb sushi preps , presentation all kudos

Its one of the most beautiful cafe i have seen in a long time. Stunning interiors and design. I tried the mushroom dim sums and it was juice and too good. Must visit here for tandoori mushroom tikka and paneer tikka, it’s one of the best i had in town. Also, tried the spice n nice that has a good flavour of peach and mint. Don’t miss out the sushi here. Highly recommended

Located at one end of district one, it’s a lil difficult to spot. The ambiance is very good and interiors are also very pleasant. Though am a hardcore non vegetarian, but had veg food at Medusa instead. For someone who is not very fond of veg food, to my surprise the food tasted delicious!!  But one of the main dish came cold n we had to have them reheat it. They lose a star for it, else the food was very good n I’d be visiting again for sure!
If you prebook on dine out then you can avail a 15% off on your bill.
